title: Ethuvumae Thonala Song Lyrics Mapla Singam
stanzas: <div>Ethuvumae Thonala Song Lyrics Mapla Singam

ethuvume thonnale
enakku enna aachu mapla
oru mura nerula
ava kanna paatha thevala

manasula pookkala
ava nattaa pora pokkula
paravura kaathula
enna patta potta moochula

naan avala rasikka
azhaga viyakka
pasiyum varala

vaai mozhiya marakka
mudangi kidakka
pozhuthum ragala

ethuvume thonala
enakku enna aachu mapla
oru mura nerula
ava kanna paatha thevala

ava pokira vazhi pokala
ava veethiyil kudiyerala
irunthaalume ava niyabagam
ena neengala

ava mela naan kuriyaagala
ava pola naan thimiraagala
mudipodura ena koondhala
manam thaangala

ethana paaviga kooda ninnaalum
konnuduthe ava vaasana aala
kattida thaaliyum selaiyum vaanga
solliduren moramamana pola

pothuva pothuva
ava paarvai moolaiyila
methuva methuva
sarijene bothaiyila

naan avala rasikka
azhaga viyakka
pasiyum varala

vaai mozhiya marakka
mudangi kidakka
pozhuthum ragala
ethuvume thonnale..

avalaala naan thala seevala
ava veettula uravaadala
aniyaama ava perula pazhi podala

perusaga naan thadumarala
puthusaga naan pokazh paadala
iru kaalume avalaalathaan
nadamaadala

vakkanaiyaa ava jaadaiya paathu
vattamum poduthu vaaliba moola

sakkaraiyaa ava pesida kettu
vandhathu vaazhvena poguren mela

pothuva pothuva
ava pesi pogayila
methuva methuva
masinjene kaadhalula

naan avala rasikka
azhaga viyakka
pasiyum varala

vaai mozhiya marakka
mudangi kidakka
pozhuthum ragala

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses joy and excitement, celebrating love and life.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Mapla Singam, the song is featured during a lively celebration scene, enhancing the festive atmosphere.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Naresh Iyer, known for his energetic performances.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music is composed by N. R. Raghunanthan, who is known for his catchy tunes.

When was the song released?

The song was released on March 11, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ethuvumae Thonala, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the joyous moments of celebration in Mapla Singam. The lively beats and catchy lyrics evoke a sense of happiness and excitement, making it perfect for festive occasions. The song captures the essence of youthful exuberance and the thrill of love, inviting listeners to dance along. Overall, it serves as an anthem for celebrations, leaving a lasting impression of joy.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ethuvumae Thonala from Mapla Singam is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the joy of celebration. With Naresh Iyer's captivating vocals and N. R. Raghunanthan's lively composition, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious rhythm and uplifting lyrics that make this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: What happened to me, I don't know, she is like a bright light, when I see her eyes, I feel good.
In my mind, she blooms, she goes away, in the air, I feel like I am caught in a net.
I can't help but admire her beauty, I can't resist my hunger for her.
Even when my mouth is shut, I can't forget her, it feels like a struggle.
What happened to me, I don't know, she is like a bright light, when I see her eyes, I feel good.
She doesn't go away from the path she takes, even if she lives in her street, you can't forget her.
I can't be like her, I can't be like her, my heart can't bear the burden of my feelings.
Even with many people, I still think of her, I will tell you to bring her fragrance and the wedding thread.
Generally, she is beautiful, her gaze is captivating, she is like a goddess in my dreams.
I can't help but admire her beauty, I can't resist my hunger for her.
Even when my mouth is shut, I can't forget her, it feels like a struggle.
What happened to me, I don't know..
Because of her, I can't think straight, in her house, she doesn't let me forget her name.
I am not a big deal, I am just a new song, I will always be with her, she is my life.
She is like a sweet thing, when she speaks, I feel like I am going to live forever.
Generally, she speaks beautifully, she is like a goddess in my dreams.
I can't help but admire her beauty, I can't resist my hunger for her.
Even when my mouth is shut, I can't forget her, it feels like a struggle.
